idea.hook: You think traveling at light speed is fast?
facts: Light takes ~1.3 seconds to reach the Moon.
It takes light ~3 minutes to reach Mars (at closest approach).
Reaching Pluto at light speed would take over 5.5 hours.
idea.payoff: But crossing the entire Milky Way galaxy would take over 100,000 YEARS even at light speed! The universe is VAST. 🤯
idea.title: How long does light speed travel take? 🤯🚀

scenes.text: You think traveling at light speed is fast?
scenes.visual: A stylized streak of light quickly crossing a dark, starry background, implying extreme speed.
Earth and Moon side-by-side, a rapid light beam animating between them.
Earth and Mars (appearing slightly further than Moon), light beam animation between them, showing a longer journey.
Earth and a tiny Pluto far in the distance, a long light path animating across the screen.

scenes.text: Milky Way: 100,000+ YEARS at LIGHT SPEED! The universe is VAST. 🤯
scenes.visual: A breathtaking, slowly rotating, full view of the entire Milky Way galaxy, filled with stars and nebulae, emphasizing its immense scale.
